---
title: "Team"
toc: false
---

We are a multidisciplinary team of bioinformaticians, computer scientists, and proteomics researchers based at Ghent University and VIB.

```{=html}
<h3 class="team-section-title">Group Leader</h3>
<div class="team-grid">
  <a href="lennart.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/lennart.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Lennart Martens">
    <div class="team-name">Lennart Martens</div>
    <div class="team-role">Group Leader</div>
  </a>
</div>

<h3 class="team-section-title">Postdoctoral Researchers</h3>
<div class="team-grid">
  <a href="sakina.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/sakina.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Sakina Bombaywala">
    <div class="team-name">Sakina Bombaywala</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="robbin.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Robbin Bouwmeester">
    <div class="team-name">Robbin Bouwmeester</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="tine.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/tine.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Tine Claeys">
    <div class="team-name">Tine Claeys</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="arthur.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/arthur.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Arthur Declercq">
    <div class="team-name">Arthur Declercq</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="ralf.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/ralf.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Ralf Gabriels">
    <div class="team-name">Ralf Gabriels</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="alex.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/alex.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Alexander Kensert">
    <div class="team-name">Alexander Kensert</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="enrico.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/enrico.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Enrico Massignani">
    <div class="team-name">Enrico Massignani</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="pathmanaban.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/pathmanaban.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Pathmanaban Ramasamy">
    <div class="team-name">Pathmanaban Ramasamy</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="tim.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/tim.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Tim Van Den Bossche">
    <div class="team-name">Tim Van Den Bossche</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="pieter.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/pieter.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Pieter Verschaffelt">
    <div class="team-name">Pieter Verschaffelt</div>
    <div class="team-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
</div>

<h3 class="team-section-title">Predoctoral Researchers</h3>
<div class="team-grid">
  <a href="toon.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/toon.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Toon Callens">
    <div class="team-name">Toon Callens</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="robbe.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/robbe.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Robbe Devreese">
    <div class="team-name">Robbe Devreese</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="sander.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/sander.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Sander Heyndrickx">
    <div class="team-name">Sander Heyndrickx</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="sude.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/sude.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Sude Güneş">
    <div class="team-name">Sude Güneş</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="caro.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/caro.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Caroline Jachmann">
    <div class="team-name">Caroline Jachmann</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="xuxa.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/xuxa.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Xuxa Malliet">
    <div class="team-name">Xuxa Malliet</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="alireza.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/alireza.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Alireza Nameni">
    <div class="team-name">Alireza Nameni</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="hari.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/hari.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Harikrishnan Ramadassan">
    <div class="team-name">Harikrishnan Ramadassan</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
  <a href="sam.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/sam.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Sam van Puyenbroeck">
    <div class="team-name">Sam van Puyenbroeck</div>
    <div class="team-role">Predoctoral Researcher</div>
  </a>
</div>

<h3 class="team-section-title">Support Staff</h3>
<div class="team-grid">
  <a href="lyuda.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/lyuda.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Lyudmila Kovalchuke">
    <div class="team-name">Lyudmila Kovalchuke</div>
    <div class="team-role">Project Manager</div>
  </a>
  <a href="patricia.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/patricia.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Patricia Lefèvre">
    <div class="team-name">Patricia Lefèvre</div>
    <div class="team-role">Group Secretary</div>
  </a>
  <a href="natalia.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/natalia.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Natalia Tichshenko">
    <div class="team-name">Natalia Tichshenko</div>
    <div class="team-role">Software Developer</div>
  </a>
  <a href="kevin.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/kevin.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Kevin Velghe">
    <div class="team-name">Kevin Velghe</div>
    <div class="team-role">Software Developer</div>
  </a>
  <a href="jasper.html" class="team-card">
    <img src="../assets/images/jasper.jpg" class="team-photo" alt="Jasper Zuallaert">
    <div class="team-name">Jasper Zuallaert</div>
    <div class="team-role">Staff Scientist</div>
  </a>
</div>
```
